A

actor() - Method in record class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.data.LedgerEntry
Returns the value of the actor record component.
actor() - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.event.LedgerRecordedEvent
Returns the actor that initiated the transaction (player UUID, CONSOLE, SYSTEM).
addBalance(String, long) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.repository.EconomyRepository
Adds money to a player's bank balance.
addBalance(Connection, String, long) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.repository.EconomyRepository
Adds money to the account using the provided connection.
addCapEarnings(Connection, String, String, String, long, long, long) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.repository.JobsRepository
Adds earned amounts to a player's daily cap usage for a reward rule.
ADMIN - Enum constant in enum class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.model.MoneySource
Admin-created changes such as /eco give, /eco take, /eco set.
all() - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.registry.JobDefinitionRegistry
Returns all configured job definitions.
amount() - Method in record class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.data.BankNoteIssueResult
Returns the value of the amount record component.
amount() - Method in record class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.data.BankNoteRecord
Returns the value of the amount record component.
amount() - Method in record class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.data.LedgerEntry
Returns the value of the amount record component.
amount() - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.event.LedgerRecordedEvent
Returns the positive amount moved in this transaction.
amount() - Method in record class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.model.JobActionContext
Returns the value of the amount record component.

B

BalanceCommand - Class in com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.command
Command executor for /bal and /balance.

Creates a balance command executor.
BankNoteInteractListener - Class in com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.listener
Listener that allows players to redeem banknotes by shift-right-clicking while holding them.
BankNoteInteractListener(Core, BankNoteManager) - Constructor for class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.listener.BankNoteInteractListener
Creates a listener that allows players to redeem banknotes by shift-right-clicking while holding them.

Result of issuing a new physical bank note.

Creates an instance of a BankNoteIssueResult record class.
BankNoteManager - Class in com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.manager
Handles issuing and redeeming physical banknotes.

Creates a bank note manager.

Immutable banknote database record.

Creates a new bank note repository.

Breaking a block.
BREW - Enum constant in enum class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.model.JobActionType
Completing a brewing action.
burn(String, long, MoneySource, String, String, String) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.manager.TransactionManager
Burns currency from a player's account (removes money).

Returns the loaded config.yml.

Loads and exposes Realm configuration files.

Core - Class in com.krishcpatel.realm.core

G

getConnection() - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.core.database.DatabaseManager

getDatabase() - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.core.Core

getJob(String, String) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.repository.JobsRepository
Returns a specific active job for a player.
getJob(Connection, String, String) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.repository.JobsRepository
Returns a specific active job for a player using an existing transaction connection.
getJob(UUID, String) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.manager.JobManager
Returns the player's progress for a specific job if they currently have it.
getJobs(String) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.repository.JobsRepository
Returns all active jobs for a player in join order.
getJobs(UUID) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.manager.JobManager
Returns all jobs currently assigned to a player.

Returns the unique banknote id stored in the item metadata.

Returns the most recent ledger entries for a player.

Grants an already-issued bank note item to a player.

Returns the value of the groups record component.

J

JobActionContext - Record Class in com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.model
A normalized player action emitted from Bukkit listeners.
JobActionContext(UUID, String, JobActionType, String, Set<String>, int, String, int, int) - Constructor for record class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.model.JobActionContext
Creates an instance of a JobActionContext record class.

Utility for adding coarse selectors such as #LOGS or #HOSTILE.
JobActionType - Enum Class in com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.model
Normalized action types that can award job progress or payouts.
JobCapState - Record Class in com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.model
Daily earned totals used to clamp job rewards.
JobCapState(long, long) - Constructor for record class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.model.JobCapState
Creates an instance of a JobCapState record class.
JobCommand - Class in com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.command
Minimal jobs command surface for joining, leaving, and viewing jobs.
JobCommand(Core, JobManager, JobDefinitionRegistry) - Constructor for class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.command.JobCommand
Creates the primary jobs command handler.

Immutable definition of a job loaded from configuration.
JobDefinition(String, String, String, LevelingSettings, Map<JobActionType, List<RewardRule>>) - Constructor for class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.model.JobDefinition
Creates an immutable job definition.
JobDefinitionLoader - Class in com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.registry
Loads job definitions from jobs.yml.
JobDefinitionLoader(Core) - Constructor for class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.registry.JobDefinitionLoader
Creates a loader that reads job definitions from plugin config.
JobDefinitionRegistry - Class in com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.registry
In-memory registry of configured jobs.
JobDefinitionRegistry(Core) - Constructor for class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.registry.JobDefinitionRegistry
Creates a new registry backed by the plugin jobs configuration.

Returns the job in which the player leveled up.
jobId() - Method in record class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.model.PlayerJob
Returns the value of the jobId record component.
JobLevelUpEvent - Class in com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.event
Event published when a player levels up in a job.
JobLevelUpEvent(UUID, String, String, int, int) - Constructor for class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.event.JobLevelUpEvent
Creates a job level-up event.
JobManager - Class in com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.manager
Main API for assigning, removing, and querying player jobs.
JobManager(Core, JobsRepository, JobDefinitionRegistry) - Constructor for class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.manager.JobManager
Creates the main jobs membership service.
JobMembershipResult - Record Class in com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.model
Result for joining or leaving a job.
JobMembershipResult(boolean, String) - Constructor for record class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.model.JobMembershipResult
Creates an instance of a JobMembershipResult record class.
JobPayoutNotifier - Class in com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.notify
Aggregates short-lived job payouts into a single satisfying action-bar pulse.
JobPayoutNotifier(Core) - Constructor for class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.notify.JobPayoutNotifier
Creates the jobs payout notifier.
JobRewardService - Class in com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.manager
Converts normalized job actions into xp, levels, and money payouts.
JobRewardService(Core, JobsRepository, JobDefinitionRegistry, EconomyRepository, LedgerRepository, JobPayoutNotifier) - Constructor for class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.manager.JobRewardService
Creates the job reward processor and its economy dependencies.
jobs() - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.core.config.ConfigManager
Returns the loaded jobs.yml.
JOBS - Enum constant in enum class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.model.MoneySource

JobsActionListener - Class in com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.listener
Converts Bukkit events into normalized job actions.
JobsActionListener(Core, JobRewardService, JobsRepository) - Constructor for class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.listener.JobsActionListener
Creates a listener that translates player activity into job rewards.
jobsConfig() - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.core.Core
Returns the loaded jobs.yml configuration.

Returns the value of the joinedAt record component.
joinJob(String, String, long, int) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.repository.JobsRepository
Joins a player to a job and initializes progress in a local transaction.
joinJob(Connection, String, String, long, int) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.repository.JobsRepository
Joins a player to a job using an existing transaction connection.
joinJob(UUID, String) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.manager.JobManager
Attempts to join the player to a configured job.

K

KILL - Enum constant in enum class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.model.JobActionType
Killing an entity.

L

leaveAllJobs(String) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.repository.JobsRepository
Removes all job memberships from a player.
leaveAllJobs(UUID) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.manager.JobManager
Removes all active jobs from the player when no-job mode is enabled.
leaveJob(String, String) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.repository.JobsRepository
Removes a single job membership from a player.
leaveJob(UUID, String) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.manager.JobManager
Removes a single active job from the player.
LedgerCommand - Class in com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.command
Admin command to view recent ledger entries for a player.

Creates a ledger command executor.
LedgerEntry - Record Class in com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.data
A single immutable row from the economy ledger.

Returns the value of the ledgerId record component.

Returns the value of the ledgerId record component.
ledgerId() - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.event.LedgerRecordedEvent
Returns the database id of the committed ledger row.
LedgerRecordedEvent - Class in com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.event

LedgerRecordedEvent(long, String, long, String, String, MoneySource, String, String, String) - Constructor for class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.event.LedgerRecordedEvent

Returns the progression settings for this job.

Loads all enabled jobs from jobs.yml.
loadAll() - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.core.config.ConfigManager
Loads (or reloads) config.yml, messages.yml, and jobs.yml from the plugin data folder.

Shared plugin logger.

M

markChunkExplored(Connection, String, String, String, int, int, long) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.repository.JobsRepository
Marks a chunk as explored for a player's job, returning whether it was a first visit.
markPlacedBlockGuard(String, int, int, int, String, String, long) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.repository.JobsRepository
Persists a placed block guard so the block cannot later be farmed for break rewards.
markRedeemed(Connection, String, long, String) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.repository.BankNoteRepository
Marks a bank note as redeemed if it has not already been redeemed.

Returns a relative match score for the given action.

Retrieves a formatted message from messages.yml without any placeholder replacements.
msg(String, Map<String, String>) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.core.Core

Creates a successful result.
ok(long, String, long) - Static method in record class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.data.BankNoteIssueResult
Creates a successful note issuance result.
ok(String) - Static method in record class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.model.JobMembershipResult
Creates a successful membership result.
oldLevel() - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.event.JobLevelUpEvent
Returns the previous job level.
onBlockBreak(BlockBreakEvent) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.listener.JobsActionListener
Handles block breaks and awards break rewards when the block is not protected by anti-farm guards.
onBlockPlace(BlockPlaceEvent) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.listener.JobsActionListener
Handles block placement, persisting anti-farm guards and dispatching place rewards.
onBrew(BrewEvent) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.listener.JobsActionListener
Handles brewing completion and dispatches brew rewards to the most recent valid brewing stand user.
onBrewingInventoryClick(InventoryClickEvent) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.listener.JobsActionListener
Tracks the last player to interact with a brewing stand so completed brews can be attributed safely.
onCommand(CommandSender, Command, String, String[]) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.core.command.RealmCommand
 
onCommand(CommandSender, Command, String, String[]) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.command.BalanceCommand

onCommand(CommandSender, Command, String, String[]) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.command.LedgerCommand

onCraft(CraftItemEvent) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.listener.JobsActionListener
Handles completed crafting actions and dispatches a normalized craft reward action.
onDisable() - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.core.Core
 
onEnable() - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.core.Core
 
onEnchant(EnchantItemEvent) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.listener.JobsActionListener
Handles enchanting actions and dispatches a normalized enchant reward action.
onEntityDeath(EntityDeathEvent) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.listener.JobsActionListener
Handles entity kills and dispatches job kill actions for valid player kills.
onEvent(T) - Method in interface com.krishcpatel.realm.core.event.RealmEventListener
Called when an event of type T is published.
onFish(PlayerFishEvent) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.listener.JobsActionListener
Handles successful fishing catches and dispatches a normalized fishing reward action.
onInteract(PlayerInteractEvent) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.listener.BankNoteInteractListener
Handles player interaction for redeeming banknotes by shift-right-clicking.
onJoin(PlayerJoinEvent) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.core.listener.PlayerJoinListener
Handles PlayerJoinEvent and syncs the player into the DB.
onMove(PlayerMoveEvent) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.listener.JobsActionListener
Handles chunk-to-chunk movement and dispatches explorer actions for newly entered chunks.

Returns the value of the reference record component.
reference() - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.event.LedgerRecordedEvent

Reloads module configuration/state without restarting the server.
reload() - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.EconomyModule

Returns the value of the requiredXpBase record component.

Returns the value of the requiredXpGrowth record component.
